summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the new tab-based semester UI in StudentProfileView and verified Analytics page shows only charts (no detailed semester cards). All 9 test cases passed successfully.
passed_tests: HOD login (HOD001/hod123) -> Student Results tab -> View Profile for student 22WJ8A6745 -> Tab-based semester UI appears with pill tabs Sem 1-8
Sem 3 is selected by default (latest), showing SGPA 7.60, CGPA 8.59, 9 subjects, All Pass status
Click Sem 1 tab -> loads Sem 1 data (SGPA 9.10, CGPA 9.10, 8 subjects)
Click Sem 2 tab -> loads Sem 2 data (SGPA 9.55, CGPA 9.33, 9 subjects)
Subject-wise results table shows subjects with code, credits, grade, status
CGPA Progression sidebar shows all 3 semesters with trend arrows (up/down indicators)
Performance Summary card shows total credits and Grade O count
Student login (22WJ8A6745/student123) -> Analytics -> Semester Analytics tab -> NO detailed semester cards, only charts (SGPA/CGPA Trend, Semester-wise SGPA bar chart)
Admin login (A001/admin123) -> Student Results -> View Profile -> same tab-based semester UI works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab-based semester UI in StudentProfileView is fully functional. The SemesterTabView component (lines 12-131 in StudentResultsSearch.js) correctly displays pill tabs for Sem 1-8, with unavailable semesters greyed out. Default selection is the latest semester. SGPA/CGPA stat cards, subject-wise results table, CGPA Progression sidebar with trend arrows, and Performance Summary card all work correctly. Analytics page Semester tab (lines 210-258 in Analytics.js) correctly shows only charts without detailed semester cards.

hod_student_profile_view.details: Tab-based semester UI with pill tabs Sem 1-8, SGPA/CGPA cards, subject table, CGPA progression sidebar, Performance Summary card

semester_tab_switching.details: Clicking Sem 1/2/3 tabs correctly loads respective semester data. Sem 4-8 are disabled (greyed out)

analytics_semester_tab.details: Shows only charts (SGPA/CGPA Trend line chart, Semester-wise SGPA bar chart) - no detailed semester cards

admin_student_profile_view.details: Same tab-based semester UI works for Admin role
